reviews.review_description: Really enjoyed this promising shooter game...the settings with the animals on looking is awesome. ..looking forward to playing more , it's a real comfortable play.

reviews.review_title: Worst vr game i have ever played
reviews.review_description: This is hands down the most boring game i have ever played in vr.

developer_response.body: Yeah, that was a very early stage. Thank you for giving it a try that time! You won't believe the difference if you try it now ;)

reviews.review_description: Overall, “Karga” is a solid addition to the VR FPS genre, offering immersive gameplay and intense firefights that will keep players coming back for more. While it may not reinvent the wheel, its polished presentation and engaging mechanics make it a worthwhile experience for VR enthusiasts looking for their next adrenaline fix.
The game has been tweaked significantly. The reviews below are for the alpha version from a very long time ago

Decently made arena shooter, simple and clear mechanics, increasing difficulty scale, interesting skil system. Effects and stylization are well combined, it's a pleasure to play. 
Now the game lacks perhaps some variety, perhaps other arenas. You get used to shooting quickly, shooting is simple and clear. Strongly knocked out of the game pace resets in the menu, as if all the end, and there is a continuation. Hopefully in the release will be all super.
An interesting and unusual game. I would like some kind of continuation.

I was standing in place shooting at colored boulders to protect a little dragon from this giant lady who was throwing rocks in our direction. I'm not sure how scoring works or why some rocks fell and others grew. I never beat the giant. A tutorial is definitely needed.

developer_response.body: Yes! And the tutorial was added, per your suggestion! Please try it now.

reviews.review_title: Not much of an actual game.
reviews.review_description: The only thing you do in this game is shoot balls at a giant old lady. I’m not joking. And she will witewy hit da gwitty if she kills Karga. It’s so stupid, it’s funny. You’ll have a bit of entertainment for a minute or two, then it’s over. I don’t really recommend this game.

developer_response.body: That release was indeed a very "first step". Check it out now ;)

reviews.review_description: Looking good so far I like the 3d models, let's get some movement in combat and some faster shooting maybe? Can't wait for an update happy to be here the whole process

developer_response.body: And the Update is there! Check it out and try to find your way to castle ;)
